title: Integration: full encrypted session lifecycle
description: End-to-end integration test covering the complete session lifecycle from connect to disconnect

steps.action: Start daemon with cowork token and PSK configured
Extension connects: auth → key exchange → hello/hello-ack
steps.expected: /api/cowork/status returns connected: true with encryption metadata
All 10 commands succeed, sequence counters reach 10 on each side

steps.action: List tabs and switch to a specific one
steps.expected: Tab operations succeed through encrypted channel
/api/cowork/status returns connected: false, session keys zeroed
New ephemeral keys generated, different daemon public key fingerprint
